title: My Brother Stole My Grandmother's Recipes And Got $380K. So I Bought His Restaurant At Auction.
description: When my TV-chef brother stole our grandmother’s recipes, trademarked them, and built a chain on my work, I spent years in court to reclaim what was mine. The judgment forced the sale of his flagship restaurant, and I bought it myself to serve every dish with her true story and the court docket of his fraud. #FamilyBetrayal #JusticeServed #RecipeRevenge
thumb_text: I BOUGHT HIS RESTAURANT AND HE LOST EVERYTHING
pinned_comment: If your own brother stole your grandmother's recipes, filed a copyright in his name, got a $380,000 deal, and branded you a liar, would you have spent years in court just to buy his flagship restaurant at auction? Tell me what you'd do in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: HE OPENED A RESTAURANT CHAIN WHILE I FOUGHT IN COURT
COURT ORDERED HIM TO SELL FLAGSHIP
I BOUGHT HIS RESTAURANT AT AUCTION
